creator: kris@obsecurity.org
text:
It looks like the xmms port has been fixed, btw.  Thanks for tracking
down the cause - it was annoying me a bit when I couldn't figure out
why the xmms ports were having such weird build failures on bento.

I don't know if this is actually a problem with the ports framework,
as opposed to a bug in any port which unconditionally enables
"optional" dependencies when built in a pristine environment (like
xmms was).

Kris
